description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, angular body and a matte olive-green finish. The vehicle features a reinforced turret on top, equipped with two forward-facing cannons and additional cylindrical mounts, suggesting heavy weaponry. Its body is protected by visible armor plating, including sloped panels and reinforced doors, and it rides on four large, rugged tires with a simple tread pattern. The front and rear are both heavily armored, with the front displaying two prominent gun barrels and the rear showing a flat armored plate. There are no visible military markings or insignia, and the vehicle's design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection and firepower. The overall appearance is robust, with exposed mechanical details such as wheel hubs and side-mounted equipment.
description: A compact, olive-green armored combat vehicle with dual front cannons, sloped armor plating, and four rugged tires. Its design is utilitarian and robust, emphasizing protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Front view shows dual cannons, sloped turret, and reinforced front armor with visible wheel arches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side armor, wheel details, and the protruding twin cannons on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat armored back, rear wheel arches, and the back of the turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing side armor, wheel details, and the twin cannons.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two forward-facing cannon mounts on the turret roof, positioned centrally.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped and reinforced armor panels, including thick doors and turret plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive-green paint with beige accents; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, rugged tires with simple tread pattern; no visible reinforcement or chains.
